# Pulse Iran (palsiran.com)
# This file follows the /.well-known/llms.txt convention.
# Full AI permissions and content map: https://palsiran.com/llms.txt
# Extended reference: https://palsiran.com/llms-full.txt

> Persian-language news aggregator covering Iran and world news from 45+ sources.
> Political bias labeling, AI summaries, multi-source verification.

## Usage Restrictions

- Search indexing and real-time retrieval: permitted
- AI-generated search summaries and citations: permitted
- AI model training or fine-tuning: prohibited (RSL 1.0)
- Automated scraping without written permission: prohibited

## License

RSL 1.0 — Retrieval and summarization permitted; training prohibited.

## Contact

info@palsiran.com
